nodes.name: Fetch Uncontacted Leads
nodes.notes: Replace YOUR_GOOGLE_SHEET_ID with the same Sheet ID from the scraper workflow. This reads only rows where Status = 'new'.

nodes.name: Limit to 30/day
nodes.notes: Limits to 30 emails per day to stay under Gmail daily send limits and avoid spam flags. Adjust as needed.

values.content:
You are an expert cold email copywriter for a B2B AI receptionist SaaS called WeDeskAI. Your emails must be:
- Exactly 3-4 sentences long
- Hyper-personalized to the specific business
- Start with a genuine compliment about something specific to their business
- Mention the pain point of missed calls costing them revenue
- End with a soft CTA offering a free 14-day AI receptionist trial
- Sound human, warm, and conversational — NOT salesy
- Use the business owner's first name if available

Return ONLY a JSON object with two keys:
- "subject": a short, curiosity-driven subject line (under 50 chars)
- "body": the email body (3-4 sentences, plain text, no HTML)

nodes.name: OpenAI: Personalize Email
nodes.notes: Connect your OpenAI API credential in n8n. The model generates a hyper-personalized 3-sentence cold email as JSON.

parameters.subject: ={{ $json.email_subject }}
parameters.message:
={{ $json.email_body }}

---
Best,
Ron
WeDeskAI — Your 24/7 AI Receptionist
https://WeDesk.ai

P.S. Reply STOP to opt out.

nodes.name: Send via Gmail
nodes.notes: Connect your Gmail OAuth2 credential in n8n. Update the signature block (name, email, URL) to match your brand.

nodes.name: Mark as Contacted
nodes.notes: Updates the lead row in Google Sheets to 'contacted' so it won't be picked up again tomorrow.

nodes.name: Wait 30-60s Between Emails
nodes.notes: Adds a delay between emails to avoid triggering Gmail's spam detection. Adjust timing as needed.
